THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSLER, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO. SUN ROOFING & CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. ALL CLAIMS ASSERTED AGAINST SUN ROOFING AND CONSTRUCTION COMPANY ARE RES JUDICATA. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF FOR INDIVIDUAL RECOVERY AGAINST DEFENDANT SURETY AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO.'S HANDLING OF BOND CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OSLER, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
